module.name: checklist
module.description: Renders an ordinary Markdown bullet list as a styled checklist, each item prefixed with a colored checkmark square.
module.aiSpec:
Use to present tasks, steps or requirements as a checklist where every item gets a colored checkmark square. Block module: the body is a single ordinary Markdown bullet list — write normal `-` bullets, one per line, and each list item becomes one checked row (nested bullets are kept). Not for interactive/tickable to-dos and not for a numbered sequence — use @process or @steps for an ordered workflow.
Parameters: • color (color, default var(--accent-color)) — fill color of the checkmark squares. • shape (select: rounded | square | circle, default rounded) — corner style of the marks; rounded ≈ 4px radius, square = sharp, circle = round dot. • size (select: sm | md | lg, default md) — overall text/mark scale. • align (select: left | center | right, default left) — horizontal alignment of the rows.
Example: <!-- @checklist color: #16a34a, shape: circle, size: lg --> - Define the goal - Gather the requirements - Build the prototype - Review and ship <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Mark Color
param.desc: Fill color of the checkmark squares

param.name: shape
param.label: Mark shape
param.desc: Corner style of the checkmark marks

snippet.label: Checklist
snippet.text: <!-- @checklist color: var(--accent-color) --> - Define the goal - Gather the requirements - Build the prototype - Review and ship <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Styled checklist from a markdown list
